issue: 28-29 MGD flow vs 25 MGD installed (112-116%). Dual-zone reporting conflict.
implication: Sewage bypassing treatment. Data manipulation risk between zones.

issue: Rs 55.70 Cr plant (2024) running at only 1.6% capacity.
implication: Capital already sunk; sewage still untreated elsewhere while new plant sits idle.

issue: Identical O&M: Rs 83.76 L every year FY21-FY26. Zero variation across 5 years.
implication: Flat figures across 5 years without any variation suggest figures may be copied, not actual.

issue: Detailed O&M, capital cost, commissioning data declared 'bulky'; applicant directed to visit office.
implication: 114 MGD of capacity unverifiable. RTI obligation not met.

issue: STP is DDA deposit work; DJB merely operates. Budget allocated by DDA.
implication: Accountability split between DDA and DJB. Reforms or upgrades require DDA approval.

issue: Rs 1168 Cr plant (15% Delhi + 85% Centre) commissioned 2025, running at only 81%.
implication: Same pattern as Sonia Vihar: massive capital spent, plant underutilised from day one. 24 MGD idle.

issue: O&M jumped from Rs 29.99 L (FY22) to Rs 131.19 L (FY23) — a 4x spike — then dropped to Rs 79.95 L and Rs 58.70 L. No explanation in RTI.
implication: Unexplained expenditure spike warrants audit. No CPCB/NGT penalty, but financial irregularity possible.

issue: Both STPs maintained by PPCL, not DJB directly.
implication: Accountability and performance monitoring rests with contractor. DJB oversight critical.

issue: Okhla 30 MGD at 43%; Okhla 16 MGD at 44%. Both over 50% idle. O&M data withheld as voluminous.
implication: Combined 26 MGD unused at established STPs. Financial waste compounded by withheld O&M data.

issue: O&M FY24 = Rs 7035 L (Rs 70.35 Cr) vs FY22 = Rs 264.42 L. A 27x spike in one year, then dropped to Rs 1385 L in FY25.
implication: Largest single-year O&M figure in dataset by far. Demands audit. No explanation in RTI. Budget utilisation only 62.5% overall despite the spike.

issue: EE-XII claims Rithala STP (40 MGD) at 100%. EE-IX claims Rithala Ph-I (40 MGD) at 40.69 MGD (101.7%). Two divisions claiming same plant.
implication: Same pattern as Yamuna Vihar dual-zone conflict. Installed capacity effectively counted twice in aggregate. Real utilisation figure unclear.

issue: O&M declared NIL for last 5 years — plant under rehabilitation. Yet utilisation reported at 40.69 MGD (101.7% overloaded).
implication: Overloaded plant with zero O&M spend for 5 years. Structural/operational integrity risk. Sewage being treated with no maintenance budget.

issue: Capacity upgraded from 40 to 60 MGD (added 20 MGD). Actual utilisation only 32.17 MGD — 53.6% of new capacity.
implication: Upgrade investment wasted. 27.83 MGD idle post-expansion. No capital cost disclosed for the upgrade.

division_stp: Keshopur Ph-I / Nilothi-II / Yamuna Vihar / Coronation 20 MGD
issue: 4 additional plants now confirmed overloaded: Keshopur Ph-I (107%), Nilothi-II (102.5%), Coronation 20 MGD (112.5%), plus existing Yamuna Vihar XIII (114%) and Rithala Ph-I (101.7%).
implication: Total 6 plants overloaded across dataset. Untreated sewage overflow systematic, not isolated.
